overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a scenic natural landscape. The character traverses grassy hillsides with views of a distant mountain featuring a twisted tree, stops at an overlook, continues through a forested area with wooden fences and rocky outcrops, and approaches a small wooden shrine structure. The footage features high-quality graphics with vivid autumn colors and cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside trail with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily up a grassy path toward an overlook point with two swords strapped to his back

entered.detail: rolling green hills with patches of brown grass
narrow winding trail through the grass
large boulders and rock formations along the path
tall vegetation with distinctive orange and red flowers
mountain peak with a large gnarled tree structure visible against the sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt trail through open grassy hills under a partly cloudy sky. The landscape features scattered rocks, tall grass with orange flowers, and a distant mountain with a distinctive twisted tree formation visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: hilltop overlook with campfire site and wooden fencing

events.description: Geralt stops walking and pans the camera to survey the surrounding landscape and distant mountain
black bird flies across the screen from right to left

agents.ego_description: Geralt pauses at the hilltop overlook to look around at the scenery, then continues walking past a campfire ring

notable_agents.action: black bird flying across the sky from right to left

entered.detail: circle of stones marking a campfire site on the ground
rough wooden posts and rails lining the path
object hanging from a wooden post near the fence

segments.scene_description: At the hilltop overlook, Geralt stops to survey the landscape before continuing along a path lined with a rustic wooden fence. A stone campfire ring sits near the path, and a black bird flies across the sky. The distant mountain shifts to the left of the frame as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with rocky outcrops and leafless trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along a winding path through a forest of bare autumn trees with rocky terrain on the right

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation alongside the path
dense forest of bare trees with autumn foliage

segments.scene_description: The path enters a denser forest area with leafless autumn trees creating partial canopy cover. Large rocky outcrops line the right side of the trail, gradually receding into the distance as Geralt continues walking through the wooded landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest approaching wooden shrine structure

events.description: wooden shrine structure comes into view ahead on the forest path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking toward a small wooden shrine structure that appears ahead on the forest path

entered.detail: small wooden structure with roof and posts, resembling a shrine or gallows, with something hanging from it

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues deeper into the forest, a wooden shrine structure comes into view ahead on the path. The trail winds through dense leafless trees with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy, leading directly toward the rustic wooden construction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, windswept hillside into the sheltered depths of an autumn forest. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt trail through grassy hills dotted with orange flowers, while a distant mountain with a twisted tree formation anchors the horizon. As he reaches a hilltop overlook and pauses, the camera continues forward past a rustic wooden fence and a stone campfire ring, shifting the distant mountain to the left as a black bird crosses the sky. The scene then transitions into a denser wooded area where leafless autumn trees form a partial canopy and large rocky outcrops line the trail. Finally, the path winds deeper into the forest under dappled sunlight, leading the camera directly toward a small wooden shrine structure.
